summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SaintSal Labs metering, tiering, and gating system. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All metering UI components working correctly.
test_credentials: No auth required - metering uses user_id parameter. Default user_id='anonymous' defaults to 'pro' tier.
seed_data_creation: None - metering system creates user records on first access
context_for_next_testing_agent: Metering system fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/metering/tier-info (5 tiers), GET /api/metering/dashboard (usage data), POST /api/metering/check-access (feature gating), POST /api/metering/log (usage tracking), POST /api/metering/set-tier (tier changes). Frontend: Sidebar widget shows tier badge, credits, progress bar, rate limit. Topbar shows dynamic credits. Tier gate modal appears when Free user tries Pro features.

backend: GET /api/metering/tier-info - Returns 5 tiers (free, starter, pro, teams, enterprise) with features, limits, costs
GET /api/metering/dashboard - Returns compute usage, rate limits, action breakdown for user
POST /api/metering/check-access - Pro user allowed for business_bizplan, Free user blocked (403)
POST /api/metering/log - Tracks usage, updates remaining credits, detects overage
POST /api/metering/set-tier - Changes tier, returns old/new tier info
Rate limiting - 300 req/hr for Pro, 30 for Free
frontend: Sidebar metering widget - Shows PRO badge, credits (0/2000), progress bar, rate limit (300/300 req/hr), Upgrade link
Topbar compute meter - Shows dynamic 'X / 2000 credits' that updates after usage
Tier gate modal - Appears when Free user tries Pro feature (Business Plan AI)
Tier gate modal content - Shows Starter ($19), Pro ($49 RECOMMENDED), Teams ($149) pricing
Credits update - Real-time update after logging usage via API (tested: 50 minutes logged, UI updated from 2000 to 1950)
Business Plan AI - Calls salCheckAccess before generating, shows tier gate for Free users

test_flow_executed: 1. GET /api/metering/dashboard confirms Pro tier for anonymous user
2. POST /set-tier to free - verified tier change
3. POST /check-access for 'business_bizplan' - correctly returns 403 for Free user
4. POST /set-tier back to pro - verified tier change
5. POST /check-access - correctly returns 200 for Pro user
6. Frontend: Verified sidebar widget shows PRO badge and credits
8. Frontend: Set tier to free, tried Business Plan → tier gate modal appeared with correct pricing
9. Frontend: Logged 50 compute minutes, verified credits updated in real-time
